title: EnvBackend::get maps VarError::NotUnicode to NotFound
description: Trigger: env var is set but contains non-UTF-8 bytes (valid on Linux). std::env::var returns VarError::NotUnicode, which EnvBackend::get maps to SecretError::NotFound. The variable exists; the correct mapping is SecretError::DecodeFailed. A caller whose secret is non-UTF-8 bytes will see NotFound and conclude the variable is absent, masking the real cause.
